settings.name: Okta Org URL
settings.description: Your Okta organization URL (e.g. https://your-org.okta.com). Found in Admin Console → Settings → Account.

settings.name: OAuth Client ID
settings.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID for secure authentication. Create a Service app (for Private Key JWT) or Native app (for Device Auth Grant) in Admin Console → Applications. Leave empty to use SSWS API token instead.

settings.name: Private Key (PEM)
settings.description: PEM-encoded private key for Private Key JWT authentication. Register the matching public key (JWK) in your Okta Service app's credentials. Leave empty to use Device Authorization Grant or SSWS instead.

settings.name: Private Key File Path
settings.description: Alternative to inline private key: absolute path to a PEM private key file (e.g. /path/to/private-key.pem). Leave empty if using inline OKTA_PRIVATE_KEY or a different auth mode.

settings.name: Private Key ID (kid)
settings.description: Key ID (kid) for the JWT header. Required only if multiple keys are registered on your Okta app. Leave empty otherwise.

settings.name: SSWS API Token
settings.description: Legacy Okta API token (SSWS). Only needed if not using OAuth (no Client ID). Create one in Admin Console → Security → API → Tokens.

settings.name: OAuth Scopes
settings.description: Space-separated OAuth 2.0 scopes (e.g. 'okta.users.manage okta.apps.manage'). Defaults to 'okta.users.manage'. Only used with OAuth flows.

settings.name: Authorization Server ID
settings.description: Custom authorization server ID (e.g. 'default'). Omit to use the org-level authorization server. Only used with OAuth flows.
